---
name: Addon proposal
about: Propose an optional addon without changing compiler/runtime core assumptions
title: "[Addon] "
labels: addon, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Addon Goal

What optional capability should this addon provide?

## Why This Should Be Optional

Why should this stay outside compiler/runtime core?

## Dependencies

What external tools, services, libraries, or platforms are involved?

## Build-Time Behavior

Does the addon run during compilation? Does it download anything?

## Runtime Behavior

Does the addon add middleware, handlers, adapters, or generated files?

## Compatibility And Security

What versioning, trust, and security boundaries are needed?
